## Current Funding Applications In Review

::: {.callout-note title="NIA-240459" collapse="false"}
### Advancing Mobile Monitoring of Intraindividual Change in Alzheimer’s Disease and Related Dementias

**Building an Open and Inclusive Infrastructure**

| Role | Sponsor | Proposed active dates | Proposed total costs |
|---|---|---:|---:|
| Nelson A. Roque, Co-Core Leader, Data Management and Analytics Core | National Institute on Aging (NIA), National Institutes of Health | 2024–2029 | $19,844,799 |

**Core allocations**

| Core | Allocation | Proposed costs |
|---|---:|---:|
| Technical Core | 10% | $4,372,510 |
| Data Core | 10% | $2,142,145 |
:::
